characters.name: 林雷
characters.appearance: A young boy around 6 years old, short black hair, wearing simple linen clothes and wooden sandals, serious expression

characters.name: Trainer A
characters.appearance: Muscular middle-aged man, bald head, wearing a sleeveless cotton vest and coarse cloth pants, standing firmly with arms crossed

characters.name: Trainer B
characters.appearance: Middle-aged man with thick eyebrows, wearing a brown sleeveless vest and loose trousers, holding a wooden staff

characters.name: Trainer C
characters.appearance: Strong-built man in his forties, wearing a gray short-back vest and dark pants, standing upright with a stern look

scenes.narration: 乌山镇，坐落于魔兽山脉西侧，晨光初照，宁静中透着生机。
scenes.visual_prompt: Wide aerial shot of a small ancient town surrounded by vast mountains at sunrise, soft golden light covers the landscape, peaceful atmosphere, fantasy style

scenes.narration: 朝阳洒落，镇东空地斑驳光影间，孩子们已列队准备晨练。
scenes.visual_prompt: Medium wide shot of an open training ground on the east side of the town, sunlight filters through large trees creating dappled light patterns on the ground

scenes.narration: 一两百名孩童分三队站立，神情肃穆，年龄自六岁至十六岁不等。
scenes.visual_prompt: Long shot showing three distinct groups of children arranged in neat rows, ranging from young kids to teenagers, all standing still under the morning sun

scenes.narration: 北侧是六到八岁的幼童队，稚气未脱却站姿笔直。
scenes.visual_prompt: Medium shot focusing on the northern group of young children (6-8 years old), trying hard to maintain posture, faces showing concentration

scenes.narration: 中间九到十二岁的孩子体格明显更强，目光坚定。
scenes.visual_prompt: Medium shot of the middle group of pre-teens (9-12 years old), more muscular build, standing confidently under the warm sunlight

scenes.narration: 南边十三到十六岁的少年们身形挺拔，已有战士风范。
scenes.visual_prompt: Low-angle medium shot of the southern group of teenage boys (13-16 years old), strong silhouettes against the rising sun, determined expressions

scenes.narration: 三位壮硕教头立于前方，短打装束尽显力量感。
scenes.visual_prompt: Three-quarter shot of three muscular trainers standing in front of the children, wearing sleeveless vests and coarse pants, early morning backlighting emphasizing their physiques
